artistContext.name: Seth Troxler
artistContext.summary: As a comparable youth on the scene, Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene. Seth's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. With much-hyped and played releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, each join the dots of his distinctive sexy techno sound.

writer.title: Seth Troxler: A Young Force in Techno
writer.subtitle: Detroit roots and Berlin relocation shape a distinctive sound.
writer.author: A. Stern
writer.excerpt: Seth Troxler, at only 22 years old, has already made significant strides in the techno scene. His Detroit roots and recent move to Berlin have positioned him among the elite of European techno.

content.text: Seth Troxler is a young artist whose achievements in the techno scene far exceed his age. His work is deeply influenced by his Detroit roots and his recent relocation to Berlin, where he has quickly established himself among the elite of the European techno scene.

Troxler's sound is characterized by a distinctive blend of techno and minimal elements. His musical influences range from the organic sounds of nature to the futuristic, incorporating elements such as the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the ethereal sounds of whistling voodoo magic.

He has released music on several respected labels, including Spectral, Wagon Repair, and M_NUS. These releases have been well-received and widely played, contributing to his growing reputation in the techno community.

Notable releases from Troxler include This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps.

Troxler's work is often described as having a distinctive techno sound, which sets him apart from his peers. His ability to blend various influences and create a unique sonic palette has earned him recognition and respect within the techno community.
